titleStmt.title: SII 16.113: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 113. (A.R. No. 159 of 1905.) MĀRKĀPŪR, MARKAPUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the east wall of the antarāḷa-maṇḍapa, Chennakēśavasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1458, Durmukhi, Mārgaśira śu. 15, lunar eclipse corresponding to 1536 A.D., November 27, (Monday), °66.

Records a gift of two villages Boḍḍucherlu and Bondalapāḍu to god Chennakēśava by Veṅkaṭādri, son of Yanddalūri Timmājyōsyulu and the nephew of Bhūtanāthani Rāmābhaṭlu for the merit of the latter. Toṇḍamāreguḷḷa-sīma in which the gift villages are stated to have been situated, was given as nāyñkara to the donor by the king. Among the various incomes derived in the gift village occurs suṁkhachūpuṭāyam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrījayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbbulu 1458 Agunēṁṭi durmmukhi saṁvatsara mārggaśira śu 15 lu . svastiśrī śrī mārakāpura śrīcannakēśa
vaperumāḷla śrīpādapadmaṁbulaku . śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara . śrīvīrapratāpa śrīAcyutadēvamahārāyalu vijayanagaramaṁddu vajrasiṁhāsanārū
ḍhulai sāmrājyaṁ cēyucuṁḍḍaṁgānu . bhūtanāthani rāmābhaṭluṁgāriki mēnalluṁḍaina yaṁddalūri timmājyōsyula kumāruṁḍaina veṁkaṭādriṁgāru daṁḍḍaṁ samarppi
ṁci Iccina dharmmaśāsanamu . śrī Acyutadēvamahārāyalu māku nāyaṁkkarānaku pāliṁcanavadhariṁccina . toṁḍamāreguḷla śīmalōni boḍḍu
cerlu boṁdalapāḍu . yī reṁḍu grāmālunnu . śrīcennakēśavaperumāḷla Amṛtapaḷla kunnu . Aṁgaraṁgavaibhavālakunnu . sōmagrahaṇa puṇyakāla
maṁdu pinākinītīramaṁddu sahiraṇyōdakadhārāpūrvakamugānu . rāmābhaṭluṁgārikiṁ puṇyaṁgānu . dhāravōśi ĀcaṁdrārkkasthāIgānu samarpistimi . I reṁḍu
grāmālaṁduṁ galigina sakalasuvarnādāyaṁ . sakaladhānyādāyaṁ . suṁkhecūpuṭāyaṁ kānike . khaḍḍāyaṁ . Illari pullari . maggari gānugari . mōdalaina sa
kaḷādāyamunnu . Aṣṭabhōgatējasvāmyaṁgānu samarpiṁstimi . yī dharmānaku yavvaru dappinānu vāraṇāśilōnu tama tallitaṁḍṟlānu gōbrāhmalānu
vadhiṁccina pāpālaṁ bōvuvāṁḍu . dānapālanayōrmadhyē dānāchrēyōnupālanaṁ . dānā tsvarggamavāpnōti pālanā dacyutaṁ padaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 16.113 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
